content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Hoarder
description: Legendary Vladof class mod for Salvador the Gunzerker. Built around Lay Waste, 5 Shots or 6, Filled to the Brim, Locked and Loaded, Incite. Provides a strong gun damage boost.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC.

special.description: At max level: +51% gun damage, +57.5% ammo regen rate.
special.title: Ain't got time for dilly-dally.
